helper.title: Privileged Helper
helper.desc: Once installed, starting/stopping the proxy and switching nodes in TUN mode no longer prompt for the admin password each time (only the one-time install needs authorization).
helper.upgradeableDesc: A newer privileged helper is available. The current version keeps TUN working; upgrading also makes core updates authorization-free (written to a protected directory). Click Upgrade below when convenient.
helper.promptDesc: TUN mode runs sing-box as administrator. After installing the privileged helper, starting/stopping the proxy and switching nodes no longer prompt for the admin password repeatedly (only this install needs authorization).
helper.pathMismatchDesc: The privileged helper's registered core path differs from the current app (the app may have been moved). Prompt-free TUN start will fail — please repair.
helper.repairPromptDesc: The app location changed (e.g. moved into Applications), but the privileged helper still points at the old path. Repairing re-registers the new path; one authorization is needed.
helper.backgroundDisabledDesc: "Allow in the Background" for this app is turned off in System Settings, so the privileged helper cannot run and TUN start/stop falls back to prompting for the admin password each time. Click "Open System Settings" below and re-enable "Allow in the Background" for FlowZ under Login Items & Extensions. This page will refresh within a few seconds once it's on.
helper.backgroundRestored: "Allow in the Background" restored — the privileged helper is available

logs.pageDesc: View sing-box core and application runtime logs

connections.pageDesc: Live view of active connections with per-connection rates
connections.closeAllWarn: This disconnects all active connections (ResetNetwork). In-flight transfers will be interrupted.
connections.rowsTruncated: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} — narrow with search

ruleResources.pageDesc: Download and manage sing-box .srs rule-sets for use in routing rules
ruleResources.libraryDesc: Pick .srs rule-sets from meta-rules-dat to download (multi-select)
ruleResources.ghProxyDesc: Optional, direct by default. Use a mirror domain when GitHub downloads are slow
ruleResources.empty: No rule resources yet. Click Library or URL Download to add
ruleResources.deleteReferencedWarn: This resource is used by {{n}} rules; deleting it will break them. Delete anyway?
ruleResources.deleteReferencedDesc: 「{{name}}」is referenced by the following {{n}} rule(s). Deleting it temporarily disables them (auto-restored after re-downloading the resource):
ruleResources.searchMore: Many results — keep typing to narrow down
ruleResources.autoUpdateDesc: Periodically re-download saved rule resources (sing-box does not auto-update local rule-sets)
ruleResources.urlHint: Enter a .srs rule-set URL; raw.githubusercontent.com links auto-apply the accelerator
ruleResources.urlInvalid: Enter an https link ending in .srs

error.invalid_content: Invalid content (possibly a proxy error page)

home.manualModeTip: Local proxy is ready! Please configure your apps to use SOCKS5/HTTP port 127.0.0.1.
home.tunNeedsAdmin: TUN mode requires admin privileges, please run the app as administrator
home.tunDriverFail: TUN driver failed to load, please check if wintun.dll exists
home.tunInterfaceFail: TUN interface creation failed, please check network settings
home.singboxMissing: sing-box core file is missing or cannot start
home.selectServerHint: Please select a server to enable proxy
home.modeGlobalDesc: All traffic goes through the proxy
home.modeSmartDesc: Direct connection for domestic, proxy for foreign
home.modeDirectDesc: All traffic goes directly without proxy
home.topologyApiError: Cannot connect to API, ensure proxy is running
home.plsStartProxy: Please start the proxy service first
home.autoScrollOff: Auto-scrolling disabled (scroll to bottom to enable)
home.ipStale: Some exit IPs failed to fetch; showing last known result

general.title: General
general.silentStartDesc: Start minimized to system tray without showing the main window
general.autoLightweightModeDesc: When idle, closes the window to free memory and stays in the tray; the proxy keeps running. Reopening restores it.
general.enableIPv6: Enable IPv6 DNS & Routing (Advanced, may cause timeouts)
general.autoPrivacyMode: Auto Privacy Protection Mode (10 mins idle)
general.autoPrivacyModeDesc: When idle, locks the UI to prevent snooping; unlock with a password. Does not affect the proxy.
general.privacyPasswordPlaceholder: Set password (leave blank to unlock freely)

coreVersion.changedDesc: Core version changed from {{previousVersion}} to {{currentVersion}}. If you experience connection issues, you can roll back to the previous version.
coreVersion.noBackupDesc: Core version changed to {{currentVersion}}. No backup is available for rollback.
coreVersion.rollbackSuccess: Rollback successful — reopen the app to apply the previous core
coreVersion.sameVersionGoManage: Please confirm the same-version replacement in the Core Management card.

coreManagement.title: Core Management
coreManagement.autoUpdateDesc: Auto-updates only within the compatible version band (e.g. 1.13.x→1.13.y); crossing a major version (e.g. 1.13→1.14) requires manual confirmation. While running, updates are only downloaded and staged — your connection is never interrupted.
coreManagement.restrictCoreUpdate: Limit update checks to the compatible version band
coreManagement.restrictCoreUpdateDesc: When off, "Check for updates" can surface cross-band versions (e.g. 1.14), which still require manual confirmation to install. Auto-update always stays within the band and is unaffected by this option.
coreManagement.stagedPending: Core {{version}} is ready and will apply automatically once the proxy stops
coreManagement.applyNowFailed: Core update failed; the previous core was restored
coreManagement.applyNowDiscarded: This staged core no longer applies and was discarded
coreManagement.applyNowDeferred: Core not applied yet; still pending
coreManagement.crossBandFound: A new cross-band version {{version}} was found and will not be auto-updated; to upgrade, check manually or update with the app.
coreManagement.updateEntryHint: The update entry now shows in the Core Management card — update anytime
coreManagement.crossBandRisk: Crosses a major version — higher risk; review before updating
coreManagement.sameVersionConfirmDesc: The selected core is the same version as the current one ({{version}}). Replace anyway?
coreManagement.dangerZoneDesc: The actions below are irreversible. Proceed with caution.
coreManagement.resetFactoryTitle: Reset core to the factory version
coreManagement.resetFactoryDesc: Restore the core to the version shipped with the app. The current core and backup will be replaced by the factory core; any manually replaced or updated core will be lost.
coreManagement.resetFactorySuccess: Core reset to the factory version
coreManagement.uninstallDesc: This will completely uninstall FlowZ and remove all of the following:
coreManagement.uninstallItemCore: The sing-box core in the protected directory
coreManagement.uninstallItemConfig: All user config, nodes, subscriptions and rules
coreManagement.uninstallWarn: This cannot be undone. The app will quit when finished.

network.title: Network
network.enableIPv6Desc: Enable global IPv6 resolution & routing; may hang on nodes without IPv6, not recommended

proxyMode.systemProxyModeDesc: Forward traffic via HTTP/SOCKS system proxy (Legacy)
proxyMode.tunModeDesc: Transparent proxy via virtual network interface (Requires Admin)
proxyMode.manualProxyModeDesc: Start local ports only without modifying system proxy or virtual adapters. Ideal for advanced users configuring third-party tools.
proxyMode.confirmDesc: Switching the takeover mode restarts the proxy to apply it, briefly dropping the current connection.
proxyMode.confirmSwitch: Are you sure you want to switch to
proxyMode.reconnectToast: Restarting the proxy to apply the new takeover mode…

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.domesticDnsDesc: Used to resolve domestic domains. Recommended: domestic DoH or UDP DNS
advanced.foreignDnsDesc: Used to resolve foreign domains, prevents DNS poisoning (sent through proxy)
advanced.dnsInvalid: Unrecognized DNS address (supports https:// DoH, tls:// DoT, udp:// or IP); not saved, please correct
advanced.fakeIpDesc: On: nodes receive domains, faster first connection, recommended for TUN mode. Off: nodes receive real IPs; some airports with strict anti-abuse may refuse connections, and overseas first-connection latency increases
advanced.fakeIpTunOffConfirmDesc: In TUN mode, after disabling, proxy nodes will receive real IPs instead of domains. Some airports with strict anti-abuse policies may refuse the connection (invalid certificate or block page), and this risk cannot be mitigated by the client. Overseas first-connection latency will also increase. Disable anyway?
advanced.nodeDomainResolverDesc: DNS used to resolve proxy node domains. Defaults to AliDNS; if node domains (e.g. Argo / trycloudflare) fail to resolve (SERVFAIL), switch to DNSPod or System DNS to recover
advanced.mainSessionViaProxyDesc: When on, app/core update checks and rule-resource downloads go through the proxy while it runs (update sources are mostly on GitHub); when off, they go direct / via system proxy. Note: under TUN mode, OS-level capture means off cannot fully bypass the proxy.
advanced.portsSame: SOCKS and HTTP ports cannot be the same
advanced.mixedPortDesc: Mixed port accepts both HTTP and SOCKS5 proxy requests on a single port, simplifying configuration
advanced.mixedPortRange: Mixed port must be between 1024 and 65535
advanced.mixedPortConflict: Mixed port cannot be the same as SOCKS or HTTP port
advanced.portsSaved: Port settings saved, take effect after restarting proxy
advanced.allowLanDesc: When enabled, the proxy port listens on 0.0.0.0, allowing other devices on the same local network to connect and access the internet.
advanced.allowLanGatewayTip: When used as a gateway (other devices set this computer as Gateway/DNS), please ensure TUN mode is enabled. This will automatically enable system IP forwarding and listen on port 53 for DNS services.
advanced.bypassLANDesc: Force requests destined for the local network to bypass the proxy (disable to allow proxying for 192.168.x etc.)
advanced.blockQuic: Block QUIC (UDP/443, nudge browsers to TCP)
advanced.blockQuicDesc: Reject proxy-bound QUIC (UDP 443) so browsers fall back to TCP. Fixes pages stalling when a node's UDP relay is unreliable. Off by default; applies to all nodes.
advanced.interruptOnSwitchDesc: Default is graceful switching: switching nodes does not restart the proxy and existing connections persist until they close naturally; new connections use the new node. When enabled, switching forcibly drops existing connections and rebuilds them on the new node immediately.
advanced.tlsFragmentDesc: Splits the TLS ClientHello across multiple TCP packets, evading plaintext-SNI keyword DPI. Not encryption and does not guarantee bypass (unlike ECH/Reality). Off by default; may slightly increase handshake latency on some networks.
advanced.logLevelDesc: Log level (applies to both sing-box connection logs and the app log). info/debug record visited domains/SNI; warn and above do not — higher levels are more private and use less disk, but record less for troubleshooting; set back to info when diagnosing issues. Takes effect immediately (the core restarts automatically if the proxy is running).
advanced.disableLogFileDesc: Fully disables sing-box logging (privacy / disk). In-app real-time logs and log-based diagnostics become unavailable; crash detection still works. Applies automatically by restarting the proxy after save (when running).
advanced.autoUpdateSubDesc: Refresh stale subscriptions on startup and periodically while running. Updates never restart the proxy, so the current connection is not interrupted (selected node and its id are preserved).
advanced.subUpdateIntervalDesc: A subscription is refreshed when its last update is older than this many hours (1–168). Default 12.
advanced.subUpdateViaProxyDesc: Off (default): fetch directly, works before the proxy is up. On: fetch through the running proxy — enable only if your subscription URL is blocked directly. When on, updates are deferred until the proxy is running.
advanced.externalControlDesc: This app controls the core via the clash API (127.0.0.1:9090). You can connect external clash clients (e.g. yacd) to manage it. The secret is the access credential, randomly generated on first launch; resetting it restarts the proxy to apply.
advanced.clashApiSecretDesc: Enter this secret as the credential when connecting an external client. Keep it private — anyone with it can view/manipulate your proxy.
advanced.clashSecretReset: Secret reset; the proxy will restart to apply
advanced.terminalProxyDesc: Copy the following commands to set proxy in terminal (proxy must be started first)
advanced.tipSessionOnly: Terminal proxy settings are only effective in the current session
advanced.tipPermanent: For permanent settings, add the command to ~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc
advanced.tipSocksPort: SOCKS5 proxy port: {{port}} (supported by some tools)
advanced.tipDisable: To disable proxy: delete or comment out the relevant environment variables

backup.title: Data Backup & Restore
backup.desc: Protect your nodes, rules, and subscriptions from being lost after reinstalling the OS or migrating to a new machine
backup.exportSuccessDesc: Configuration saved to file. Keep it safe (it contains passwords and sensitive data).
backup.importInvalidFile: Invalid file. Please select a valid FlowZ backup file.
backup.importConfirmDesc: This will completely overwrite your current nodes, subscriptions, and rules. This action cannot be undone. Please confirm before proceeding.

advanced.autoSwitchNodeDesc: Automatically switch to an available node if the current proxy connection fails

about.title: About
about.builtWith: A cross-platform proxy client built on sing-box
about.requestTimeout: Request timed out (no response in 20s), please retry
about.coreAlreadyLatest: Core is already up to date
about.doNotClose: Do not close the app, proxy service may be temporarily interrupted

servers.echDesc: Encrypts the ClientHello and hides the SNI to bypass SNI-based blocking. Requires server/DNS ECH support.
servers.multiplexDesc: Reuses multiple connections over a single tunnel, reducing handshake overhead and resisting connection fingerprinting.
servers.multiplexDisabled: Multiplex is incompatible with the current configuration and has been disabled.
servers.multiplexPaddingDesc: Pads traffic with random data to strengthen fingerprint resistance (slight overhead).
servers.multiplexVisionConflict: Multiplex is incompatible with the xtls-rprx-vision flow and has been disabled.
servers.hopPortsDesc: Comma-separated port ranges, e.g. 20000:30000,40000:50000. Leave blank to disable.
servers.hopIntervalDesc: Interval between port hops, e.g. 30s. Leave blank for the default.
servers.pageDesc: Manage your proxy servers and subscription links
servers.serverAddressDesc: Use domain name or IP address
servers.sniDesc: TLS Server Name Indication, leave empty to use server address
servers.subNodeEditHint: This node belongs to a subscription. Your edits will be overwritten on the next update — use "Clone to Manual Nodes" to keep a durable copy.
servers.deleteServerDesc: Are you sure you want to delete server "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
servers.batchDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {{count}} manually added nodes? This action cannot be undone.
servers.noServersDesc: You haven't added any server configs yet. Click the button above to add your first server.
servers.noSubNodesDesc: This subscription has no nodes yet. Click the Update Nodes button above to fetch the latest data.
servers.noMatchingDesc: Try adjusting your search keywords or filters.
servers.deleteSubDesc: Are you sure you want to delete subscription "{{name}}"? This will also delete all {{count}} nodes under it. This action cannot be undone.
servers.nodeInvalid: Invalid node config, skipped at startup
servers.deleteFailDesc: An error occurred while deleting the server
servers.selectFailDesc: An error occurred while selecting the server
servers.saveFailDesc: An error occurred while saving the server
servers.remarksDesc: Set a recognizable name for the server
servers.passwordDesc: The connection password configured on the server
servers.editServerDesc: Modify server configuration. Proxy will not restart automatically after saving.
servers.addServerDesc: Add a new proxy server. Supports VLESS, Trojan, Hysteria2, Shadowsocks, AnyTLS, TUIC, and Naive.
servers.detourDesc: Connect to this node through another proxy server (proxy chain)
servers.flowDesc: XTLS flow control, Reality recommends xtls-rprx-vision
servers.enableShadowTlsDesc: Wrap Shadowsocks with a TLS obfuscation tunnel

naive.versionWarning: ⚠️ Naive protocol requires sing-box v1.13+ core. If you are using v1.12, please go to 'Settings -> About' to update your core.
naive.useHttp3Desc: This node dials over QUIC/UDP (server must listen on quic://, with HTTP/3 enabled). Its own QUIC dial is protected and not killed by "Block QUIC"; browser QUIC to this node is still handled per the "Block QUIC" setting.

ssh.userDesc: SSH login user, defaults to root
ssh.privateKeyPathDesc: Absolute path to the private key file; leave empty to use the inline key below
ssh.privateKeyDesc: Paste the private key content directly (the private key path takes precedence)
ssh.hostKeyDesc: Leave empty to accept all host keys (not recommended in production). Run ssh-keyscan host to obtain one.

rules.ruleDialogDesc: Pick a rule type, enter match values, route by policy
rules.deleteConfirm: This action cannot be undone. Delete this rule?
rules.deleteErrorDesc: An error occurred while deleting the rule
rules.processHint: Only locally-originated connections can be matched by process

typeHints.domainSuffix: One domain per line (matches it and all subdomains)
typeHints.domainKeyword: One keyword per line; matches if the domain contains it
typeHints.domainRegex: Golang RE2 regex; no lookahead / backreferences
typeHints.ipCidr: One per line; a bare IP means a single host; IPv4/IPv6 both OK
typeHints.port: One port or range per line (e.g. 443 or 1000-2000)
typeHints.sourcePort: One source port or range per line
typeHints.processName: One process name per line (Windows includes .exe)
typeHints.processPath: One full process path per line
typeHints.geosite: One tag per line (e.g. youtube), or pick from common tags below
typeHints.geoip: One tag per line (e.g. cn), or pick from common tags below

domain.name: Domain
domain.desc: Match the exact full domain, no subdomains

domainSuffix.name: Domain Suffix
domainSuffix.desc: Match the domain and all its subdomains (recommended)

domainKeyword.name: Domain Keyword
domainKeyword.desc: Match if the domain contains the keyword

domainRegex.name: Domain Regex
domainRegex.desc: Match domain by Golang RE2 regex (advanced)

processName.name: Process Name
processName.desc: Executable file name (Windows incl. .exe); local connections only

ruleSet.name: Rule Set
ruleSet.desc: Remote rule-set URL or a downloaded local resource

processPicker.title: Pick Process
processPicker.desc: Select from running processes to quickly add a process rule

rules.appRulesDesc: Quickly set proxy policies for popular apps
rules.appRoutingDisabledHint: App routing is off: all apps follow the global routing policy and the rules below have no effect. Note: custom routing rules always take precedence over app routing.
rules.targetMissingTip: The selected node was deleted; at runtime it falls back to following the global selected node.
rules.orderConflict: Rules changed elsewhere; exited order editing.
rules.customRulesDesc: Manage domain, IP/port, process and rule-set routing rules
rules.ruleListDesc: Custom rules take precedence over app policy, smart routing and global mode; matched top-to-bottom, first match wins
rules.addFirstRule: Click the button above to add your first rule
rules.enableRuleTip: Disabled rules will not take effect
rules.bypassFakeIpTip: No need to enable by default. Only use for QUIC/UDP protocol compatibility (e.g. Cloudflare Tunnel).
rules.bypassFakeIpDisabledTip: FakeIP is globally disabled in Settings - Network, so this switch has no effect (no traffic goes through FakeIP).
rules.saveErrorDesc: An error occurred while saving the rule
rules.errorEmpty: Please enter at least one domain or IP CIDR
rules.instruction1: · Rules span four groups (Domain / IP·Port / Process / Rule Set) with 13 types; a rule can combine multiple conditions (match any by default, or switch to match all), one match value per line
rules.instruction2: · "Domain Suffix" matches the domain and all subdomains (recommended); "Domain" matches exactly, no subdomains
rules.instruction3: · Process rules apply only to locally-originated connections (Windows names include .exe); "Process Name + Direct" lets an app bypass the proxy
rules.instruction4: · Rules match top-to-bottom, first match wins; custom rules take precedence over app policy, smart routing and global mode
rules.instruction5: · "Rule Set" accepts a remote URL (.srs/.json), or reference a local resource downloaded on the Rule Resources page; for Geosite/GeoIP enter a tag (e.g. youtube / cn)
rules.instruction6: · Bypass FakeIP: Uses real DNS resolution, domain rules only, suitable for QUIC/UDP protocols (like Cloudflare Tunnel)

customApp.fillNameAndGeosite: Please enter the app name and Geosite tags
customApp.searchIconPlaceholder: Search in Qure Color / EDC libraries...
customApp.iconLoadFailed: Failed to load cloud icon libraries (network restricted)
customApp.manualIconHint: You can paste an icon image URL manually (.png / .webp, etc.):
customApp.addDesc: Create a rule as easily as using a built-in app.

sub.addDesc: Enter subscription URL to import server nodes
sub.autoUpdateDesc: When enabled, FlowZ will attempt to update subscription nodes on startup
sub.userAgentDesc: User-Agent used when fetching the subscription. Leave empty to use the default; some providers return different formats based on the UA.

importUrl.title: Import Server from URL
importUrl.desc: Supports vmess://, vless://, trojan://, hysteria2://, hy2://, ss://, anytls://, tuic:// and http2:// protocol links. Paste multiple links (one per line) for batch import.
importUrl.urlPlaceholder:
vmess://base64(json)
or vless://uuid@server:port?encryption=none&security=tls&type=ws#name
or trojan://password@server:port?security=tls#name
or hysteria2://password@server:port?sni=example.com#name
or ss://base64(method:password)@server:port#name
or anytls://password@server:port?security=tls&sni=example.com#name
or tuic://uuid:password@server:port?sni=example.com#name
or http2://username:password@server:port#name

Support multiple links, one per line
importUrl.parseResultDesc: Click the edit icon to rename a node

errors.operationFailed: Operation failed, please try again later
errors.startupFailed: sing-box failed to start: the process could not start normally, please check the server configuration
errors.connectionTimeout: Connection timed out: could not establish a connection in time, please check the server configuration

privacy.title: Privacy mode enabled
privacy.subtitle: The interface is locked. Enter your password to continue.

errorBoundary.title: The application encountered an error
errorBoundary.description: Sorry, the application encountered an unexpected error. You can try refreshing the page or contact technical support.
